title: Selling goods and services: complying with consumer law
body: "Complying with consumer law     Being transparent about prices How to give customers clear and accurate information about prices   Getting consent for additional charges when selling online How to meet your responsibilities when selling optional extras to customers   Treating customers fairly How to avoid unfair commercial practices   Making green claims How to make green claims responsibly   Identifying and preventing fake reviews What are ‘fake reviews’ and your responsibilities to stop them   Writing a fair contract How to make sure your terms and conditions are fair   Accepting returns and giving refunds When you must give refunds   Marketing and advertising What you need to know about marketing and advertising      Access all consumer law guidance for businesses from the CMA.   About the CMA  The CMA helps people, businesses and the UK economy by promoting competitive markets and tackling unfair behaviour. Read more about the CMA and what we do.  "
